name: FORLIFE Co., Ltd.
summary: FORLIFE Co., Ltd. provides condominiums and custom-built homes in Yokohama city, Kanagawa prefecture, Kawasaki city, and Jonan District of Tokyo. The company also offers ready-built houses. The company was formerly known as Four Life & Company Co., Ltd. and changed its name to FORLIFE Co., Ltd. in May 2013. FORLIFE Co., Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
